channel.title: 4 on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in 4 on My New Hugo Site

item.description:
2025-04-09

M9

M9最新版本lmkd起不来

04-09 19:17:34.727 28711 28711 I cameraopt-lowmemorykiller: read_config_file : LmkdConfig open failed! file: /odm/etc/camera/cameraopt.json
04-09 19:17:34.727 28711 28711 E lowmemorykiller: get lmkd control socket failed
04-09 19:17:34.727 28711 28711 I lowmemorykiller: exiting

‍

title: 2025-04-09 date: 2025-04-09T09:52:40Z lastmod: 2025-04-09T19:20:15Z

2025-04-09

M9

M9最新版本lmkd起不来

04-09 19:17:34.727 28711 28711 I cameraopt-lowmemorykiller: read_config_file : LmkdConfig open failed! file: /odm/etc/camera/cameraopt.json
04-09 19:17:34.727 28711 28711 E lowmemorykiller: get lmkd control socket failed
04-09 19:17:34.727 28711 28711 I lowmemorykiller: exiting

‍

2025-04-08

BUGOS2-399290

02-20 18:34:54.191 10126 23597 12770 D CAM_OfflineImageDataZipper: [K_PROCESS]: getParallelTaskData : timestamp = 1062212432186464 ,parallelTaskData = ParallelTaskData[mTimestamp=1062212432186464, mSavePath='/storage/emulated/0/DCIM/Camera/IMG_20250220_183452.jpg', isAbandoned=false, mDataParameter=ve.x@9c5bf6]
02-20 18:34:54.191 10126 23597 12770 D CAM_OfflineImageDataZipper: [K_PROCESS]: setResult: timestamp = 1062212432186464 imageName=IMG_20250220_183452.jpg
02-20 18:34:54.192 10126 23597 12770 D CAM_OfflineImageDataZipper: [K_PROCESS]: handleDataBeanIfReady: dataBean with timestamp 1062212432186464 is ready
02-20 18:34:54.192 10126 23597 12770 I CAM_PerformanceManager: [P_PERFORM]: Action: shot_device_capture_163_0 takes 1962 ms
02-20 18:34:54.192 10126 23597 12770 D CAM_OfflineImageDataZipper: [K_PROCESS]: getParallelTaskData : timestamp = 1062212432186464 ,parallelTaskData = ParallelTaskData[mTimestamp=1062212432186464, mSavePath='/storage/emulated/0/DCIM/Camera/IMG_20250220_183452.jpg', isAbandoned=false, mDataParameter=ve.x@9c5bf6]
02-20 18:34:54.192 10126 23597 12372 D CAM_OfflineSessionManager: [K_PROCESS]: preProcessOfflineEvent: READY android.hardware.camera2.impl.CameraOfflineSessionImpl@56b3df2
02-20 18:34:54.192 10126 23597 12770 D CAM_OfflineImageProcessor: [K_PROCESS]: process: E timestamp = 1062212432186464
02-20 18:34:54.192 10126 23597 12770 D CAM_OfflineImageDataZipper: [K_PROCESS]: getParallelTaskData : timestamp = 1062212432186464 ,parallelTaskData = ParallelTaskData[mTimestamp=1062212432186464, mSavePath='/storage/emulated/0/DCIM/Camera/IMG_20250220_183452.jpg', isAbandoned=false, mDataParameter=ve.x@9c5bf6]

到shot_device_capture就没有后续了, 需要看看app逻辑

2025-04-07

N12 UFI

111778190

无Log

‍

==111772006==

预览卡顿

有trace, 从trace上看是没内存了, kswap0占用极高, 导致卡顿

‍

111745689

打开微距闪退

‍

log丢失严重

看log是成功打开了微距对应的摄像头, 但是没有出帧, 中间log全丢了

大量:

04-04 18:13:36.195  1047 22711 23012 W MtkCam/TemplateRequest: impConstructRequestMetadata_by_SymbolName(100):constructCustRequestMetadata_COMMON_SENSOR_DRVNAME_ROTHKOIMX906WIDE_MIPI_RAW not found
04-04 18:13:36.195  1047 22711 23012 W MtkCam/TemplateRequest: impConstructRequestMetadata_by_SymbolName(100):constructCustRequestMetadata_DEVICE_DEFAULT not found
04-04 18:13:36.196  1047 22711 23012 W MtkCam/TemplateRequest: impConstructRequestMetadata_by_SymbolName(100):constructCustRequestMetadata_DEVICE_SENSOR_DRVNAME_ROTHKOIMX906WIDE_MIPI_RAW not found
04-04 18:13:36.196  1047 22711 23012 W MtkCam/TemplateRequest: impConstructRequestMetadata_by_SymbolName(100):constructCustRequestMetadata_PROJECT_SENSOR_DRVNAME_ROTHKOIMX906WIDE_MIPI_RAW not found

对应这里, 看一下正常情况下这里的symbol是否相同, 如果相同, 会不会是so库出了问题?

@startuml
getMtkcamProviderInstance -> MtkCameraProvider
MtkCameraProvider -> CameraDeviceManagerImpl.initialize : CameraDeviceManagerImpl继承CameraDeviceManagerBase
CameraDeviceManagerImpl.initialize -> NSTemplateRequestManager.constructTemplateRequests
NSTemplateRequestManager.constructTemplateRequests -> ITemplateRequest.getInstance
ITemplateRequest.getInstance -> onCreate
onCreate -> constructRequestMetadata
constructRequestMetadata -> impConstructRequestMetadata
impConstructRequestMetadata -> dlopen : libmtkcam_metastore.so
impConstructRequestMetadata -> impConstructRequestMetadata_by_SymbolName
@enduml

正常版本也有此log, 非问题.

2025-04-01

https://codeforces.com/contest/2091

‍

Cameraopt

失效, @沈旭 正在处理

‍

用户反馈

N12

111626966

丢日志, 无有效信息, 看现象像是陀螺仪问题

‍

111645581 111624131

小图问题

‍

111599232

无日志, 后台不多

看视频显示画面昏暗模糊, 不清楚是否为暗光策略?

‍

111536957 111536812

同一个人

有可能是灯光问题

需要画质看看

‍

111454669

陀螺仪问题

‍

111422760

无有效日志

退出相机后桌面壁纸黑屏, 退出相机动画卡顿

‍

‍

M12

111553556

报:

03-26 23:02:55.584  1047  1431   319 E ae_mgr_v4l2: [6][getAlgoDbgData] Failed to allocate memory for AlgoDebugData size(231564) is_enable_ndd(0) (getAlgoDbgData){#2367:vendor/mediatek/proprietary/hardware/libcam_hal/libmgr/ae_mgr/ae_mgr_flow.cpp}

可能是内存不足

111479025

陀螺仪问题

111387905

无log

‍
